However, I found a plant called 'Tripterygium wilfordii' also known as 'Thistle Spine or Leopard Flower' or 'Trihisperus wilfordii'. This plant is a type of flowering plant in the Celastraceae family, native to China.

Tripterygium wilfordii has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tripterygium wilfordii include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which may help with autoimmune diseases, such as rheumatoid arthritis.

The bioactive constituents of Tripterygium wilfordii include triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

The most common herbal preparations made with Tripterygium wilfordii include decoctions, infusions, and capsules.
